from flask import Flask, current_app, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"] = 100
app.config["FEATURE_V2"] = True
app.config["API_TIMEOUT"] = 30


@app.route("/users")
def list_users():
    page_size = current_app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"]
    users = db.fetch_users(limit=page_size)
    return jsonify(users)


@app.route("/products")
def list_products():
    limit = current_app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"]
    timeout = current_app.config["API_TIMEOUT"]
    products = catalog.fetch(limit=limit, timeout=timeout)
    return jsonify(products)


@app.route("/dashboard")
def dashboard():
    if current_app.config["FEATURE_V2"]:
        return render_v2_dashboard()
    return render_v1_dashboard()


@app.route("/reports")
def reports():
    max_size = current_app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"]
    feature_flag = current_app.config["FEATURE_V2"]
    timeout = current_app.config["API_TIMEOUT"]
    return generate_report(max_size, feature_flag, timeout)
